category_sources: source_facts.description says help2man automatically generates simple man pages; the official GNU manual describes generating manual pages from program output.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name gives the project/formula name as help2man; the official GNU page title is help2man.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GNU help2man page and contains the reference manual.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; the official GNU help2man page at https://www.gnu.org/software/help2man/ lists GNU source distribution mirrors but no official source-control project URL.
tags_sources: source_facts.description states simple man page generation; source_facts.homepage identifies GNU as the official project host.
